productDisplayName: Nike Women As See The Win Black T-Shirts
description: Composition Black crew-neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with interior neck taping, short sleeves and screen-print on the front Fitting Slim Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean With a slim Fit that contours your body, this nike "See The Win" t-shirt is conspicuously inspiring. Tackle whatever's ahead of you in this tee, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day.
